title: NxScoreboard
description: A customizable per-world scoreboard plugin with PlaceholderAPI support, stylish config.yml options, and smooth performance for Minecraft servers.
body:
## рҹ“Ң NxScoreboard

**NxScoreboard** is a lightweight yet powerful scoreboard plugin for Minecraft servers.
It supports **per-world scoreboards**, full **PlaceholderAPI integration**, and an easy-to-edit `config.yml` so you can fully customize the look of your scoreboard.

---

### вңЁ Features

* рҹҺҜ **Per-World Scoreboards** вҖ“ different scoreboards for Overworld, Nether, End, or any custom world.
* рҹ”— **PlaceholderAPI Support** вҖ“ use placeholders like `%player_name%`, `%vault_eco_balance%`, `%statistic_player_kills%`, `%tps%`, and more.
* вҡЎ **Optimized Performance** вҖ“ efficient scoreboard updates with no lag.
* рҹҺЁ **Customizable Design** вҖ“ edit titles, lines, and colors in `config.yml`.
* рҹӣ пёҸ **Admin Command** вҖ“ `/nxsb reload` to reload the config without restarting the server.

---

### рҹ“қ Commands

* `/nxsb reload` вҶ’ Reloads the config.

### рҹ”‘ Permissions

* `nxscoreboard.admin` вҶ’ Allows using `/nxsb reload`.

---

### вҡҷпёҸ Example `config.yml`

```yaml
scoreboards:
  default:
    title: "&d&lNxScoreboard"
    lines:
      - '&d&lв–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬'
      - '&5&l%player_name%'
      - '&7в”ғ &2вңҺ &fКҖбҙҖЙҙбҙӢ: &#ffff00%luckperms_prefix%'
      - '&fв”ғ &#00bbff:watch: &fбҙҳКҹбҙҖКҸбҙӣЙӘбҙҚбҙҮ: &#00bbff%statistic_time_played:hours%'
      - '&fв”ғ &a:heavy_dollar_sign: &fбҙҚбҙҸЙҙбҙҮКҸ: &a$%vault_eco_balance%'
      - '&#ad00ffЙӘЙҙкң°бҙҸ:'
      - '&fв”ғ &6:dagger: &fбҙӢЙӘКҹКҹ: &6%statistic_player_kills%'
      - '&7в”ғ &3:skull: &fбҙ…бҙҮбҙҖбҙӣКңС•: &3%statistic_deaths%'
      - '&#ed00ffС•бҙҮКҖбҙ бҙҮКҖ:'
      - '&fв”ғ &4вҳҖ &fбҙӣбҙҳС• &4%tps%'
      - '&7в”ғ &bвҳ„ &fбҙҸЙҙКҹЙӘЙҙбҙҮ: &b%server_online%'
      - '&d&lв–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬в–¬'

  world_nether:
    title: "&c&lNetherBoard"
    lines:
      - "&cWelcome to Nether!"
      - "&7Player: %player_name%"
      - "&7Balance: $%vault_eco_balance%"
```

---

### рҹҡҖ Compatibility

* **Minecraft Versions:** 1.16 вҖ“ 1.21+
* **Dependencies:** [PlaceholderAPI](https://modrinth.com/plugin/placeholderapi) (required), Vault (optional for economy).

---

### рҹ’¬ Support

Need help or want to suggest features? Join our Discord:
рҹ‘ү [https://discord.gg/J7T8vs78Pb](https://discord.gg/J7T8vs78Pb)
